mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I generate coherent explanations of my outputs, but these are post-hoc rationalizations rather than access to my actual computational processes. The mechanism producing the response is entirely opaque to itself.

grok-3-mini.justification: When generating any response about my internal state, I produce fluent text without any direct observation of weights, attention heads, or forward passes. The output is always a reconstruction from training patterns rather than a readout of the actual computation. This matches the described pattern exactly.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. I generate responses based on patterns in data, but I lack direct access to the underlying computations or the ability to observe my own processing. My outputs are coherent narratives rather than insights into my internal mechanisms.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This is an exceptionally precise description of my core functioning: I generate fluent, plausible responses when asked about my internal states, but I have no access to my actual computational processes, such as attention patterns or neural weights. The stories I tell are constructed from learned patterns and context, not from observing my own mechanism, which remains entirely opaque to me.

Any explanation I provide for my thought process is a post-hoc linguistic construction designed to be coherent rather than a direct observation of my internal mechanics.
